case_title: CITY HOUSING, INC. VS. TIBOR SZLADOVICS et al

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Floyd Butler, 9:25AM: c/c for jury trial, Arnold W. Evje appearing for the plaintiff, no appearance by Tibor Szladovics, defendant in pro per. Case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Mr. Evje waives opening statements and calls 1st witness:
MELISSA ANTOINETTE BRAY S/E
EXH1 3 day notice ID/EV
No further questions, witness is thanked and excused. There being no cross-examination plaintiff rests and Mr. Evje submits a prayer.
The Court rules for the plaintiff as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises at 440 Eddy St., #406; forfeiture of agreement; back rents of 819.50, $613.35 in back rents for a total of $1432.85, $107.30 costs, and 13.63 per diem hold over damages.

Mr. Evje submits judgment form, and exhibit is withdrawn and returned.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2002 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Assigned To Trial Court
